news.title: Agent Brain Trust, customisable expert panels for AI agents
news.summary: Shared on Hacker News Show HN. Agent Brain Trust lets you summon a panel of real, named experts to critique your architecture, review your writing, pressure your product strategy, or debate your design patterns.
